global_description: A small, slender bird with a rounded body and short tail. It features a streaked brown and buff plumage with a pale underbelly. The wings and back are patterned with dark streaks, and the head has a distinctive striped crown.

part_details.plumage: Streaked brown and buff with a pale underbelly, providing camouflage.
part_details.wings: Brown with dark streaks, medium length, aiding in flight.
part_details.head: Striped crown with alternating light and dark bands.

spatial_relations: The striped crown is positioned on top of the head.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The short tail extends from the rear of the body.
